description: If you want to possess a trendy and stylish look, just have a glance over the range of classy footloose backpacks. Innovative designs, graceful colours and high grade fabrics are some relevant qualities of these bags. They are known for their extreme quality features which include flawless finishing, low price rates, enough space, light weight, trendy style and supreme quality fabric.Height: 42 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 17 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of 600 d PU fabric for enhanced durabilityTwo roomy zippered compartments one with a laptop chamber and a velcro closureOne small zippered pocket on the front to hold earphonesOne zippered pocket on the front with organiser pouches to hold your mobile and essentials and a key chain as wellTwo side zippered pockets for enhanced spaceBrand name embroidered on the front and printed on the strapBrand badge appliqué d on the sidePadded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh under the straps that ensure ventilation and distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
